title: Watch: Many killed in multi-vehicle collision in Bihar’s Katihar
description: Ten people were killed and 25 others injured following a collision involving a bus, a truck, and a pickup van in Bihar’s Katihar district on Saturday (April 11, 2026) evening, a police officer said. The accident took place at 6.30 p.m. on NH 31 in Kodha block of Katihar.
